name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
New Arc de Triomphe bag, full of premium feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it's the steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram, etc... all radiate incomparable premium feel ❤️ The Kelly's classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, all exuding aesthetic charm 🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113 Cappuccino
Size: 20.5x13x8 (with original packaging)
